evals.prompt: Build me a live tracker for unread Gmail emails that need action from me
evals.expected_output: A Cowork live artifact (HTML) that scans unread Gmail via the correct, freshly-discovered connector tool names, uses AI triage to keep only emails needing action, groups into categories, and lets the user mark items read (individually and in bulk) as a real Gmail action.

evals.prompt: I keep missing important stuff in my inbox, especially official emails where the actual ask is buried further down past the preview text. Can you make me a live dashboard that only shows unread emails that genuinely need something from me, and let me mark them handled without leaving the page?
evals.expected_output: Same artifact, but should specifically demonstrate the snippet-truncation second-pass (re-checking important/official-looking emails against full body) and a working mark-as-read action inline in the UI, since the user explicitly called out both of these needs without naming them technically.
